recommendations.overview: After winning the lottery, a convict must chase down the warden who has his winning ticket.

recommendations.title: Asterix & Obelix: Mission Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: History's favorite Gauls assist Queen Cleopatra when she wagers that the Egyptian people can build a palace for Julius Caesar in just three months.

recommendations.title: Cool Runnings
recommendations.overview: When a Jamaican sprinter is disqualified from the Olympic Games, he enlists the help of a dishonored coach to start the first Jamaican bobsled team.

recommendations.title: Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: With their freedom on the line, the Looney Tunes seek the help of NBA superstar Michael Jordan to win a basketball game against a team of moronic aliens.

recommendations.title: Torrente: The Dumb Arm of the Law
recommendations.overview: A former policeman enlists his nerdy friend to help bust drug traffickers moving heroin through a Chinese restaurant.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.
